case_title: MARIA CECILIA AVILA CHAN VS. EAST LIFESTYLE CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATI

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, MARIA CECILIA AVILA AS TO DEFENDANT EAST LIFESTYLE CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATI ON JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAN, MARIA CECILIA AVILA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EAST LIFESTYLE CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATI ON $132,463.42 PRINCIPAL, $2,011.52 INTEREST, $224.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $134,699.44, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
